---
name: second-iteration
description: This prompt includes the second iteration of a web app. Here we're going to focus on improving the styling of the app
---

Overview: I want to add the gov uk frontend design system to this app 

Requirements: 
* Follow the instructions here to install the gov uk frontend design system: https://frontend.design-system.service.gov.uk/installing-with-npm/#get-the-css-working
* Use the design system for gudiance on components, e.g. text inputs: https://design-system.service.gov.uk/components/text-input/
* Lets just try and get something working, not to worry too much around adding new functionality.
